name: @eventra/business-admin
description: Eventra Business Admin — internal monitoring/supervision console for the commercial Eventra Business Client. Vite SPA, packaged as the Tauri desktop app. Never acts as a client company; monitors, reviews, diagnoses, audits, and intervenes with permissions.

scripts._comment:tauri: tauri-action invoca `npm run tauri build`; sin este script el release falla con 'Missing script: tauri' antes incluso de firmar.

eventra.note: Internal admin/monitoring console for the Eventra Business Client. Tauri-packaged. Consumes @eventra/* shared packages; imports no other app.
